PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Continued To Nov-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dawna Tish Loeb appeared by zoom for Ebony Haight (petitioner).

The court asked counsel for an update with respect to closing out the estate. Mrs. Loeb stated that they discovered a couple more relatives, that they served them in September and that they filed a petition to terminate the estate with a hearing date of November 4, 2024. Status on close of estate is continued to November 5, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The hearing date of November 4, 2024, is also continued to November 5, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard by the same Judicial Officer.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Sep-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dawna Tish Loeb, via Zoom, for Ebony Bryant Haight, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges the issue regarding instructions on how to appear remotely. The court waives the requirement regarding Local Rule 14.1.d. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-04-2011 is admitted to probate. Ebony Bryant Haight is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-21-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
